author: Adman
text:
Hello, first of all thanks for this awesome project.

I installed guake on my new laptop with ubuntu 16.04 LTS. On my old laptop with 14.04, when opened "screen irssi" in guake, I was able to press shortcut ctrl+arrow to send special command to irssi. Now it seems it doesn't work in guake, because trying it in default ubuntu terminal it works perfectly.

author: Adman
text: Ah, sorry, I haven't realized that in new guake ctrl+arrow is bound to some command.
